projects.name: Fibonacci VGA Generator
projects.title: 16-Bit Fibonacci Generator with custom VGA Output
projects.description: A hardware-based Fibonacci sequence validator featuring a custom VGA display controller, built on the ZedBoard FPGA using pure Verilog RTL.
projects.detail: Developed during the 48-hour Tantrotsav hackathon. Features a custom Moore FSM, debounced physical inputs, a 16-bit datapath with overflow protection, and a custom-engineered VGA sync controller to render real-time visual output. Secured 4th place out of 48 teams.

projects.name: Speleo-X
projects.title: Speleo-X
projects.description: A low-cost, ROS-based ground robot designed for GPS-denied cave environments, featuring custom 3D laser-stitching and AI-driven mineral classification.
projects.detail: Engineered an autonomous platform using 2D LiDAR, IMU, and wheel odometry, fused via a custom push-broom stitching node to extrude volumetric 3D maps. Integrated a synthetic-NIR spectral pipeline and a MobileNetV2 CNN on edge compute to classify geological formations with up to 97.9% confidence in zero-light conditions.

projects.name: DriveSync
projects.title: DriveSync — V2V Communication
projects.description: Engineered a real-time V2V communication platform using ESP-NOW with <5ms latency for collision avoidance and decentralized navigation.
projects.detail: Built a peer-to-peer vehicular communication system using Python, ROS, and YDLIDAR sensors. SLAM-based navigation with a custom control codebase. Broadcasts speed, heading, and emergency alerts to all vehicles within 200m at sub-5ms latency.

projects.name: 4-bit Calculator
projects.title: 4-Bit ALU Calculator
projects.description: Hardware implementation of a 4-bit arithmetic calculator using discrete logic components and C++. Supports addition, subtraction, and multiplication with 8-bit output.
projects.detail: Built a 4-bit ALU from fundamental logic gates — implements ADD, SUB, AND, OR, XOR with carry-in/out, overflow detection, and 7-segment display output. Designed PCB layout and verified with simulation before fabrication.

projects.name: Smart Vending Machine
projects.title: Smart Medicine Vending Machine
projects.description: Developed a sustainable healthcare solution providing 24/7 access to essential medicines in remote areas using Raspberry Pi, RFID, and Flask.
projects.detail: Deployed in remote villages — no pharmacist needed. Uses Raspberry Pi for processing, RFID prescription verification, Flask backend for real-time inventory management, and temperature-controlled compartments for sensitive medicines.

projects.name: Fiber-Optics Light Collector
projects.title: Fiber-Optic Solar Light Collector
projects.description: A solar collector concentrating sunlight via a matrix of solar luminescence concentrators made of fiber optic material, guiding light to replace electrical lighting.
projects.detail: Array of fiber-optic solar luminescence concentrators collect and concentrate sunlight into fiber optic cables, guiding it to interior spaces. Reduces electricity consumption by replacing artificial lighting during daylight hours.
